jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at NoBroker
jsonLd.description:
Join the NoBroker family as a Frontend Developer in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
